# CR Analyze Checklist

Include this checklist in every generated CR spec and mark each item as done,
not applicable, or requiring follow-up:

- [ ] Product behavior change is stated in one sentence.
- [ ] Product direction, UC, and CRS impact checked with `/product-impact`.
- [ ] CRS, SYS, and SRS requirement impact checked with `/req-manage`.
- [ ] Architecture and SYSARCH impact checked with `/architecture-impact`.
- [ ] Risk and RCM impact checked with `/risk-impact`.
- [ ] SOUP and dependency impact checked with `/soup-impact`.
- [ ] Test impact checked with `/test-impact`.
- [ ] Expected product code touchpoints are identified.
- [ ] Verification approach is stated with the smallest sufficient automated checks.
- [ ] Manual test need is stated, including when no manual test is expected.
- [ ] Open questions are listed, or explicitly marked as none.
